channel.title: GTmetrix on Kovasky Buezo | Software Developer, Cybersecurity Enthusiast
channel.description: Recent content in GTmetrix on Kovasky Buezo | Software Developer, Cybersecurity Enthusiast

item.title: How I improved the performance of my Hugo site to reach 0.5s LCP while staying under 512kB
item.description: Intro I have been using Hugo to build my personal website for a few years now. I love how easy it is to use and how customizable it is through themes, modules, and templates. I am always looking for ways to improve my site and make it more performant. Over time, I have accumulated a few optimizations, which I thought I’d share in the hopes that other people find them useful.
